positive: A whimsical illustration of a sleepy fox curled up inside a giant, bioluminescent mushroom. The scene is set in a magical, misty forest clearing at golden hour. Style: Cottagecore, Studio Ghibli aesthetic, watercolor painting, highly detailed, soft pastel color palette, volumetric lighting, depth of field, hyperrealistic elements, trending on ArtStation, whimsical fantasy art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy lines, harsh shadows, photorealism, monochrome, disturbing, scary, aggressive
